en.extract:
The white-throated shrike-tanager (Lanio leucothorax) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Costa Rica, Honduras, Nicaragua, and Panama. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests.

The '''white-throated shrike-tanager''' ('''''Lanio leucothorax''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Thraupidae]]. It is found in [[Costa Rica]], [[Honduras]], [[Nicaragua]], and [[Panama]]. Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s.
